biography: Riku, brother of the esteemed Panu, is known for his meticulous approach to the game. While his career in the Hector Trophée circuit might be behind him, his impact remains.

With one past appearance, Riku brought a level of strategic thinking that was admired by his peers. Though he has not yet claimed either the Hector Trophée or the Victor Trophy, his contributions to the sport are notable. Riku is currently considered retired from Hector Trophée events.
